flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at State Technical College of Missouri rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($12.8k → $14.6k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at State Technical College of Missouri rose 14% between 2006 and 2009 ($4.7k → $5.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at State Technical College of Missouri fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at State Technical College of Missouri are 51% above the public associate's-predominant peer median ($55.9k vs $36.9k).
